verdicts.note: Parental rights explicitly establishes the traditional-values direction, but the dossier supplies no specific curriculum, gender-content, or school-control proposal supporting maximal strength.
He opposes higher taxes on working families, a targeted position rather than categorical opposition to new revenue or a broad tax-cut program.

review_notes: All eight scores were reviewed. Broad affordable-housing and mental-health priorities lack the mechanisms needed for additional axis scores.
